case_title: MARWA TEBASSI VS. CAROLYN JANE GODWIN

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY TEBASSI, MARWA AS TO DEFENDANT GODWIN, CAROLYN JANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED FEB-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GODWIN, CAROLYN JANE
REMARK:ETURN MAIL. ORDER OF DIMSISSAL MAILED TO CAROLYN JANE GODWIN -NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-29-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK, (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED DEC-29-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GODWIN, CAROLYN JANE
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE: MATTER CONTINUED TO MAY 27, 2001 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPARTMENT 506. (PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS NOT VALID) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-12-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARWA TEBASSI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAROLYN JAN GODWIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-27-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARWA TEBASSI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAROLYN JANE GODWIN IS NOT PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. COURT EXAMINES PLAINTIFF'S FILED PROOF OF SERVICE TO DETERMINE IF THE FILED PROOFS OF SERVICE ARE VALID. PLAINTIFF IS EXAMINED AS TO HOW SHE OBTAINED THE ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT. A GOOGLE MAP SEARCH RESULT DOES NOT SHOW AN ADDRESS FOR 325 MOUNT VERNON AVE. SF., CA. NO SUCH ADDRESS IS FOUND ON GOOGLE MAPS. COURT DETERMINES THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS NOT VALID. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: CONTINUANCE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.
